title: Protect Anna from overwork
description: Ensure Anna's basic survival needs (roof, food, water) are provided and she is not overworked.
full_idea: Remember that It is my responsibility to protect Anna from being overworked by providing her the requirements for survival. Roof, food, water.
source_text: Remember that It is my responsibility to protect Anna from being overworked by providing her the requirements for survival. Roof, food, water.
